meta.title: Enquiry List
meta.description: Review and submit your product enquiry. Share the specifications, quantity, destination, and timeline so our team can respond with the right details.

hero.eyebrow: Exports from India across key sectors
hero.heading: A reliable export partner for products made in India.
hero.sub: We help global buyers source Food & Agro, Chemicals, Mechanical products, and Paper from India. Share your requirement and our team will coordinate suppliers, specifications, documents, packaging, and shipment.

intro.heading: One team to manage your sourcing and export requirements.
intro.body: Tell us what you need and where it needs to go. We identify suitable suppliers, confirm product details, arrange the required documents, and coordinate the shipment. You receive clear updates and have one team to contact throughout the order.
intro.vision: To become a trusted long-term EXIM partner for businesses that source from India and trade across global markets. We aim to make cross-border buying clearer, more reliable, and easier to manage.
intro.mission: To support buyers with reliable product sourcing, careful supplier coordination, required export documents, suitable packaging, and clear shipment updates from enquiry to dispatch.
intro.spec: Product sourcing · Export documents · Shipment support

groups.heading: Explore our Food & Agro products.
groups.sub: Our online catalogue currently covers Food & Agro products. If you need chemicals, mechanical products, paper, or a product that is not listed, send us your requirement.
groups.alliumsBlurb: Onion, garlic, and vegetables in multiple cuts and forms for food production.
groups.powdersBlurb: Fruit and vegetable powders for beverages, bakery, blends, and instant foods.
groups.spicesBlurb: Whole and powdered spices, chilli flakes, taste enhancers, and seasoning blends.
groups.herbsBlurb: Oregano, basil, thyme, rosemary, kasuri methi, and mixed herbs.
groups.nutraceuticalBlurb: Moringa, spirulina, ashwagandha, amla, and other plant-based powders.
groups.wellnessBlurb: Dairy powders, edible seeds, jaggery, A2 ghee, cold-pressed oils, and millets.

why.heading: What you can expect when you work with us.
why.catalogueBody: Browse our Food & Agro catalogue online. For chemicals, mechanical products, paper, or other requirements, send our team the specifications.
why.founderBody: Our founder-led team takes time to understand your requirement and keeps you updated through each stage of the order.
why.docsBody: We confirm which specifications, certificates, commercial documents, and export documents are required for your product and destination.
why.logisticsBody: We confirm the grade, quantity, packaging, destination, timeline, and commercial terms before the order proceeds.

testimonials.heading: Long-term relationships are built through reliable work.

certs.heading: See the registrations behind our Food & Agro exports.
certs.sub: Each registration is shown with its issuing authority and what it means for the buyer. Documents for a specific product or destination are confirmed during quotation.

process.heading: How an export order works with Traya.
process.sub: You receive the product and commercial details before you approve the order.
process.step1Body: Share the product name, specification, quantity, packaging, destination, and required timeline. We will ask for any missing details.
process.step2Body: We confirm the product, available specifications, documents, sample options, pricing, and commercial terms.
process.step3Body: After approval, we coordinate the order, packaging, documents, and dispatch. We keep you informed as the order progresses.

faq.heading: Important details before you place an order.
faq.moqQ: What are your minimum order quantities?
faq.moqA: MOQs depend on the product, grade, supplier, and packaging format. Share your target quantity and destination, and we will confirm the workable minimum with the quotation.
faq.samplesQ: Can I get a sample before ordering?
faq.samplesA: Sample availability depends on the product and destination. Where samples are available, we will confirm the format, documentation, courier cost, and dispatch timeline before proceeding.
faq.leadtimeQ: What are your typical lead times?
faq.leadtimeA: Lead time varies by product, quantity, packaging, documentation, and destination. We provide a realistic schedule after reviewing the complete requirement.
faq.paymentQ: Which Incoterms and payment terms do you offer?
faq.paymentA: Available Incoterms and payment terms depend on the product, shipment size, and destination. We list the applicable options in the quotation.
faq.packagingQ: Do you offer custom or private-label packaging?
faq.packagingA: Bulk, custom, and private-label options may be available depending on the product and order volume. Share your pack size, material, labelling, and destination requirements for confirmation.
faq.certsQ: Which certifications and documents do you provide?
faq.certsA: Document requirements vary by product and importing country. We confirm the applicable registrations, specifications, certificates, test reports, and export documents during quotation.

finalCta.heading: Source from India with Traya.
finalCta.sub: Send the product name, specifications, quantity, and destination. We will review the requirement and explain the available products, documents, packaging, pricing, and next steps.

meta.title: About
meta.description: Learn about Traya International Exim LLP, a multi-sector Indian EXIM company helping buyers source products from India with clear coordination and dependable trade support.

hero.heading: An Indian EXIM partner for buyers across sectors.
hero.tagline: Sourcing, documents, packaging, and shipment support from one team.
hero.body: Traya International Exim LLP helps international buyers source products from India across Food & Agro, Chemicals, Mechanical products, and Paper. Our Food & Agro catalogue currently includes 150+ products across 18 categories. For every requirement, we focus on clear product details, reliable coordination, required documentation, and practical shipment support.

founder.heading: Trade is, first, a relationship.
founder.name: Neha Pardeshi
founder.p1: The world didn't open up to me through textbooks. It opened up through travel. Exploring different cultures, meeting people from all walks of life, and seeing the world through different perspectives shaped not only who I am, but also what I chose to build.
founder.p2: I believe global trade works best when people communicate clearly and treat each order with responsibility. Behind every shipment is a buyer, a supplier, and a relationship that needs trust.
founder.p3: At Traya International EXIM, our goal is to make global sourcing easier and more dependable for buyers who need clear communication, careful coordination, and a team they can reach when it matters.
founder.p4: What began as a passion for exploring the world has evolved into a business driven by commitment, integrity, and a truly global vision. And we are only just getting started.

principles.heading: Discipline and care, in every engagement.
principles.body: What defines us is the way we handle each enquiry, each supplier conversation, and each shipment detail. Our work is guided by three practical standards.
principles.p1Body: Product details, documents, packaging, commercial terms, and shipment needs are checked before an order moves ahead.
principles.p2Body: We keep communication, follow-up, and coordination steady from first enquiry to dispatch.
principles.p3Body: We communicate clearly about what is available, what needs confirmation, and what the next step should be.

why.heading: A practical partner for international sourcing.
why.body: Traya was built to help buyers reduce confusion in international trade. We bring product sourcing, supplier coordination, documentation, packaging, and shipment support into one clear workflow.
why.w1Body: You work with a team that takes ownership of the requirement and follows through on the details.
why.w2Body: We confirm specifications, quantities, packaging, documents, commercial terms, and timelines before the order proceeds.
why.w3Body: We aim to support repeat buyers with clear answers, steady updates, and dependable coordination.
why.w4Body: You can speak to a real team that understands the requirement and responds with practical next steps.
why.w5Body: We support requirements across Food & Agro, Chemicals, Mechanical products, Paper, and other trade enquiries.
why.w6Body: We confirm the specifications, certificates, commercial documents, and export documents required for the product and destination.
why.w7Body: We share pricing, timelines, order status, and pending requirements clearly, so you know what is happening at each stage.

vision.vision: To become a trusted long-term trade partner for businesses sourcing from and selling into global markets.
vision.m1: Help buyers source the right products from India with clear specifications and supplier coordination.
vision.m2: Support international trade with practical documentation, packaging, and shipment coordination.
vision.m3: Build lasting trade relationships through reliable communication, fair dealing, and consistent follow-up.
vision.commitment: We are not building a firm of one-time transactions. We are building a trade partner buyers can return to for clear support across products, sectors, and markets.

hero.body: Reach us by email, phone, WhatsApp, or the enquiry form. Share the product name, specifications, quantity, destination, and timeline so our team can review it properly.

Contact.hours: We respond after reviewing your requirement

meta.title: Certifications & Quality
meta.description: See Traya International Exim's Food & Agro registrations and the documentation approach used to support buyer confidence and export compliance.

hero.heading: Documents matter in international trade.
hero.body: For Food & Agro exports, Traya works with the registrations and documents buyers commonly need to review before an order proceeds. For every product and destination, we confirm the applicable specifications, certificates, commercial documents, and export paperwork during quotation.

why.heading: Trust, backed by process, not promises.
why.body: We earn buyer confidence through clear requirements, careful supplier coordination, and documents that can be reviewed before shipment.
why.t1Body: Our Food & Agro export work is supported by registrations and memberships relevant to Indian food and agricultural exports.
why.t2Body: We review the product requirement, available grades, packaging needs, and supplier capability before confirming an offer.
why.t3Body: Specifications, certificates, test reports, commercial documents, and export paperwork are confirmed based on the product and destination.
why.t4Body: Product details, quantity, packaging, destination, commercial terms, and timeline are kept clear so buyers can review the order properly.

certs.heading: Food & Agro registrations buyers can review.
certs.sub: Each registration is listed with the issuing authority and its relevance for Food & Agro exports.

fssai.issuedBy: Food Safety & Standards Authority of India
fssai.meaning: Supports compliance with India's statutory food-safety framework for applicable Food & Agro products.

apeda.issuedBy: Agricultural & Processed Food Products Export Development Authority
apeda.meaning: Shows registration with India's agricultural and processed food export authority for applicable export activities.

fieo.meaning: Shows membership in India's national export promotion ecosystem.

spiceBoard.meaning: Relevant for spice exports and related compliance under the Spices Board of India.

msme.meaning: Shows Traya as a registered Indian enterprise for business and trade activity.

trace.heading: The right documents are confirmed before shipment.
trace.body: Document requirements are different for every product and importing country. We confirm what applies to your order before dispatch.
trace.d5: Commercial invoice, packing list, and export paperwork

Certifications.disclaimer: Registrations and memberships shown may apply to Traya International Exim or partner production facilities. Exact scope, certificate availability, and destination requirements are confirmed during quotation.

meta.title: Capabilities
meta.description: Traya International Exim supports buyers with product sourcing, supplier coordination, export documentation, packaging, and shipment coordination across key sectors.

hero.heading: Trade support from requirement to shipment.
hero.body: Traya helps buyers source products from India and coordinate the steps that make an export order work: supplier discussions, specifications, packaging, documents, commercial terms, and shipment updates.

core.heading: Core capabilities for international buyers.
core.c1Body: We help buyers source Food & Agro, Chemicals, Mechanical products, Paper, and other export requirements from India based on specifications, quantity, and destination.
core.c2Body: We coordinate with suitable suppliers to check availability, grade, packaging, production readiness, and order feasibility.
core.c3Body: We help confirm the specifications, certificates, test reports, commercial documents, and export documents required for the product and destination.
core.c4Body: We review packaging needs, shipment mode, destination requirements, and dispatch timelines so the order can move with fewer surprises.
core.c5Body: We keep the buyer informed about available options, pending details, quotation terms, order status, and next steps.

foundations.heading: The standards behind every capability.
foundations.body: These standards keep the sourcing and export process easier for buyers to understand and manage.
foundations.f1Body: Clear product requirements, clear commercial terms, and clear next steps.
foundations.f2Body: A defined flow for enquiry review, supplier coordination, documentation, and shipment follow-up.
foundations.f3Body: Steady communication and practical follow-up from enquiry to dispatch.
foundations.f4Body: Support for repeat buyers across multiple product sectors and markets.
